summary: The diff implements all three requirements with high fidelity. REQ-1 is covered by the new QissaMapSearchBar component and Nominatim geocoding in QissaMapPage. REQ-2 is covered by searchLocationMarker.ts and map fly/pan logic in QissaMapView. REQ-3 is covered by popularStoryMarker.ts, proximity story fetching via useGetNearbyStoriesForMap, popularity sorting, and rendering popular story markers. One acceptance criterion under REQ-3 — each floating story indicator showing the story title and a brief excerpt or category badge — is only partially satisfied as the marker shows a category emoji but no title label is visible in the marker HTML.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each floating story indicator shows the story title and a brief excerpt or category badge.
missing_requirements.reason: The popularStoryMarker.ts only renders a category emoji and a colored pin shape. No story title or excerpt text is rendered in the marker HTML. While a category emoji badge is present, the title and excerpt portion of this AC is not implemented.
